title: gate_feedback projection
description: Structured-only composer-retry feedback projected from a gate_result by scripts/pipeline/gmj_map_feedback.py (GUARD-04). Field names are locked to the frozen tests/fixtures/gate_feedback.sample.json shape and are NEVER renamed: fabricated_claims items carry the PLURAL claims_index (matching the fixture), source_span, and a deterministic reason sentence; missing_must_haves is a plain string array. additionalProperties:false forbids any evaluator prose / transcript / gate stdout leaking into a retry.
